title: STPI Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 15 Apprentice Posts
description: Software Technology Parks of India (STPI) has declared the official notification for 2026. To fill up the vacancies for 15 Apprentice Jobs. Those candidates who have qualified in the B.E/ B.Tech, Diploma, or any degree can grab this chance and apply for the STPI Recruitment 2026 . Here we included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, applciation fee, and how to apply for these posts.
